content.Query:
let threshold = 0.99;
AzureDiagnostics
| where url_s startswith "https://api.platform.pagopa.it/checkout/carts-auth/v1/carts" and method_s == "POST"
| summarize
  Total=count(),
  Success=count(responseCode_d < 500) by bin(TimeGenerated, 15m),
  watermark=threshold
| extend availability=toreal(Success) / Total
| project  availability,watermark, TimeGenerated
| render timechart with (xcolumn=TimeGenerated, ycolumns=availability, watermark, kind=default)

AzureDiagnostics
| where url_s startswith "https://api.platform.pagopa.it/checkout/carts-auth/v1/carts" and method_s == "POST"
| summarize count() by tostring(toint(responseCode_d)), bin(TimeGenerated, 15m)
| render areachart with (xtitle = "time", ytitle= "count" )

let threshold = 1000;
AzureDiagnostics
| where url_s startswith "https://api.platform.pagopa.it/checkout/carts-auth/v1/carts" and method_s == "POST"
| summarize
    watermark=threshold,
    duration_percentile_95=percentiles(DurationMs, 95) by bin(TimeGenerated, 15m)
| render timechart with (xtitle = "time", ytitle= "response time 95th percentile (ms)")

inputs.name: Query
inputs.value:
let threshold = 250;
AzureDiagnostics
| where url_s == "https://api.platform.pagopa.it/ecommerce/notifications-service/v1/emails" and method_s == "POST"
| summarize
    watermark=threshold,
    duration_percentile_95=percentiles(DurationMs, 95) by bin(TimeGenerated, 15m)
| render timechart with (xtitle = "time", ytitle= "response time(s)")

inputs.name: Query
inputs.value:
let threshold = 0.95;
AzureDiagnostics
| where url_s == "https://api.platform.pagopa.it/ecommerce/notifications-service/v1/emails" and method_s == "POST"
| summarize
  Total=count(),
  Success=count(responseCode_d < 500) by bin(TimeGenerated, 15m)
| extend availability=toreal(Success) / Total
| project TimeGenerated, availability, watermark=threshold
| render timechart with (xtitle = "time", ytitle= "availability(%)")

content.Query:
let threshold = 0.99;
AzureDiagnostics
| where url_s startswith "https://api.platform.pagopa.it/ecommerce/checkout/v1/carts" and method_s == "GET"
| summarize
  Total=count(),
  Success=count(responseCode_d < 500) by bin(TimeGenerated, 15m),
  watermark=threshold
| extend availability=toreal(Success) / Total
| project  availability,watermark, TimeGenerated
| render timechart with (xcolumn=TimeGenerated, ycolumns=availability, watermark, kind=default)

inputs.name: Query
inputs.value:
AzureDiagnostics
| where url_s == "https://api.platform.pagopa.it/ecommerce/notifications-service/v1/emails" and method_s == "POST"
| extend HTTPStatus = case(
  responseCode_d between (100 .. 199), "1XX",
  responseCode_d between (200 .. 299), "2XX",
  responseCode_d between (300 .. 399), "3XX",
  responseCode_d between (400 .. 499), "4XX",
  "5XX")
| summarize count() by HTTPStatus, bin(TimeGenerated, 15m)
| render areachart with (xtitle = "time", ytitle= "count")
